name: Sega Genesis Controller (Nintendo Switch Online)
notes: 170-byte Joy-Con Bluetooth HID descriptor (firmware-family analog, not a direct 0x201E capture). NSO retro controllers share Nintendo's Joy-Con/Pro Controller firmware framing (Report IDs 0x21/0x30/0x31/0x32/0x33/0x3F). The generic gamepad report declares 16 buttons + 1 hat + 4 axes; the physical Genesis NSO only wires up ~10 buttons (A, B, C, X, Y, Z, Start, Mode, Home, Capture) and has no analog sticks, so the ghost buttons/axes are always zero. Replace with a direct 0x201E capture (Linux: usbhid-dump after unbind; Windows: HidD_GetReportDescriptor) when available.
